member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Frontend.FrontendModel
member.summary: Represents a model from the OpenRouter frontend API

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Frontend.FrontendProvider
member.summary: Represents a provider from the OpenRouter frontend API

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ChatRole
member.summary: Represents the role of a participant in a chat conversation.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ChatRole.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the role of a participant in a chat conversation.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ChatRole.System
member.summary: System message role, typically used for instructions or context.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ChatRole.User
member.summary: User message role, representing input from the user.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ChatRole.Assistant
member.summary: Assistant message role, representing responses from the AI model.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ChatRole.Tool
member.summary: Tool message role, representing results from tool/function calls.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ChatRole.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the chat role.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ChatRoleConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for the ChatRole type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.CompletionFinishReason
member.summary: Represents the reason why the model stopped generating tokens. OpenRouter normalizes finish reasons across different providers.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.CompletionFinishReason.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the reason why the model stopped generating tokens. OpenRouter normalizes finish reasons across different providers.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.CompletionFinishReason.Stop
member.summary: The model hit a natural stop point or a provided stop sequence.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.CompletionFinishReason.Length
member.summary: The maximum number of tokens specified in the request was reached.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.CompletionFinishReason.ToolCalls
member.summary: The model called a tool/function.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.CompletionFinishReason.ContentFilter
member.summary: Content was omitted due to a content filter.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.CompletionFinishReason.Error
member.summary: An error occurred during generation.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.CompletionFinishReason.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the finish reason.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.CompletionFinishReasonConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for the CompletionFinishReason type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.DataCollectionOption
member.summary: Represents data collection preferences for provider routing.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.DataCollectionOption.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents data collection preferences for provider routing.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.DataCollectionOption.Allow
member.summary: Allow data collection by the provider.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.DataCollectionOption.Deny
member.summary: Deny data collection by the provider.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.DataCollectionOption.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the data collection option.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.DataCollectionOptionConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for the DataCollectionOption type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.MessageContentType
member.summary: Represents the type of content in a chat message part.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.MessageContentType.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the type of content in a chat message part.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.MessageContentType.Text
member.summary: Text content type for regular text messages.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.MessageContentType.ImageUrl
member.summary: Image URL content type for images (either URLs or base64 encoded).

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.MessageContentType.InputAudio
member.summary: Input audio content type for audio data.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.MessageContentType.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the content type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.MessageContentTypeConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for the MessageContentType type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.Modality
member.summary: Represents the input/output modalities supported by a model.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.Modality.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the input/output modalities supported by a model.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.Modality.Text
member.summary: Text modality for text input/output.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.Modality.Image
member.summary: Image modality for image input/output (vision models or image generation).

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.Modality.Audio
member.summary: Audio modality for audio input/output.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.Modality.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the modality.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ModalityConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for the Modality type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ObjectType
member.summary: Represents the type of object returned in the response.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ObjectType.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the type of object returned in the response.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ObjectType.ChatCompletion
member.summary: Represents a complete chat completion response.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ObjectType.ChatCompletionChunk
member.summary: Represents a streaming chunk of a chat completion response.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ObjectType.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the object type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ObjectTypeConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for the ObjectType type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.PredictionType
member.summary: Represents the type of prediction for latency optimization.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.PredictionType.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the type of prediction for latency optimization.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.PredictionType.Content
member.summary: Content prediction type - provides the model with predicted output to reduce latency.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.PredictionType.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the prediction type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.PredictionTypeConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for the PredictionType type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ResponseFormatType
member.summary: Represents the type of response format for structured outputs.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ResponseFormatType.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the type of response format for structured outputs.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ResponseFormatType.JsonObject
member.summary: JSON object format - ensures the response is valid JSON.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ResponseFormatType.JsonSchema
member.summary: JSON schema format - validates response against a provided schema.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ResponseFormatType.Content
member.summary: Content format - used for predicted content responses.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ResponseFormatType.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the response format type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ResponseFormatTypeConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for the ResponseFormatType type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ToolType
member.summary: Represents the type of tool that can be used in function calling.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ToolType.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the type of tool that can be used in function calling.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ToolType.Function
member.summary: Function tool type, used for function/tool calling.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ToolType.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the tool type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ToolTypeConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for the ToolType type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.VerbosityLevel
member.summary: Represents the verbosity level for model responses. Controls the length and detail of generated content.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.VerbosityLevel.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the verbosity level for model responses. Controls the length and detail of generated content.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.VerbosityLevel.Low
member.summary: Low verbosity - produces more concise responses.

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.VerbosityLevel.Medium
member.summary: Medium verbosity - balanced response length (default).

member.name: F:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.VerbosityLevel.High
member.summary: High verbosity - produces more detailed and comprehensive responses.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.VerbosityLevel.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the verbosity level.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.VerbosityLevelConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for the VerbosityLevel type.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient
member.summary: Client for interacting with the OpenRouter API. Provides methods for sending chat completion requests to various LLM models.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.#ctor(Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified configuration.
member.param: The configuration options for the client.
member.exception: Thrown when the configuration is invalid.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.#ctor(Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified configuration and HTTP client.
member.param: The configuration options for the client.
An optional HTTP client instance. If null, a new instance will be created.
member.exception: Thrown when the configuration is invalid.

member.name: P:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.Configuration
member.summary: Gets the configuration used by this client instance.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.SendChatCompletionAsync(Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ChatRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a chat completion request to the OpenRouter API.
member.param: A cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.StreamChatCompletionAsync(Codezerg.OpenRouter.Models.ChatRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a streaming chat completion request to the OpenRouter API.
member.param: A cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An async enumerable of chat completion chunks.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.GetActivityAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets activity data grouped by model endpoint for the last 30 UTC days. Requires a provisioning key for authentication.
member.param: Optional date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format.
A cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: Activity data for the specified period.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.GetCreditsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the total credits purchased and used for the authenticated user.
member.param: A cancellation token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.GetProvidersAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a list of providers available through the API with their policies and status information.
member.param: A cancellation token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.GetModelsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a list of models available through the API.
member.param: A cancellation token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.GetUserModelsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a list of models filtered based on the user's provider preferences. Requires authentication.
member.param: A cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: List of models filtered by user preferences.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.GetModelEndpointsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets endpoints for a specific model.
member.param: A cancellation token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.GetGenerationAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets details for a specific generation by ID.
member.param: A cancellation token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClient.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the .

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions
member.summary: Options for configuring the .

member.name: P:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions.ApiKey
member.summary: The API key used to authenticate requests to OpenRouter.

member.name: P:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions.Endpoint
member.summary: The API endpoint URL (defaults to the OpenRouter API endpoint).

member.name: P:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions.DefaultModel
member.summary: The default model used for requests, unless overridden per request.

member.name: P:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions.Timeout
member.summary: Timeout for API requests (default: 100 seconds).

member.name: P:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions.UserAgent
member.summary: The required User-Agent string for OpenRouter attribution. Example: "my-app/1.0" or "github.com/myuser/myrepo".

member.name: P:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions.Referer
member.summary: The required "HTTP-Referer" header for OpenRouter attribution. Example: "https://myapp.com".

member.name: P:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions.EnableDebugLogging
member.summary: Whether requests should log debug information.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptionsExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for . Provides validation, cloning, and fluent-style configuration.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptionsExtensions.Validate(Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions)
member.summary: Validates that the instance has the required properties set. Throws if validation fails.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptionsExtensions.Clone(Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates a shallow copy of the options instance.

member.name: T:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient
member.summary: Client for accessing OpenRouter's frontend/private API endpoints. WARNING: These are undocumented private APIs that may change without notice. Use at your own risk in production environments.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the OpenRouterFrontendClient.
member.param: Optional HttpClient instance. If not provided, a new one will be created.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.GetProvidersAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all available providers from the frontend API.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.GetModelsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all available models from the frontend API.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.FindModelsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds models based on specific criteria.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.GetModelStatsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets statistics for a specific model endpoint.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.GetModelsByProviderAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets models by provider.
member.returns: List of models from the specified provider

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.GetModelsByModalityAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets models that support specific modalities.
member.returns: List of models supporting the specified modalities

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.GetReasoningModelsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets models that support reasoning (chain-of-thought).

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.GetFreeModelsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets free models.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.GetByokProvidersAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets providers that support bring-your-own-key (BYOK).

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.GetPrivacyFriendlyProvidersAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets providers with privacy-friendly policies (no training, no retention).

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Codezerg.OpenRouter.OpenRouterFrontendClient.Dispose
member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.
